ItacPersonItem.Notes: Tasso`s portrait as accademico Etereo is taken from Lorenzo Crasso, Elogii d`huomini letterati (1666), and his protrait as accademico animoso is taken from Tomasini, Illustrium virorum elogia (1630).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
